🎓NBTE Approved

About Brainstorm Academy Skills Learning Center

Empowering youth with practical skills and NBTE-certified training for a brighter future

17+NSQ Courses
10+Years Experience
100%NBTE Certified
3EsGuaranteed
🏛️Institution

Academy Profile

Brainstorm Academy is a private training institution approved by the Kaduna State Government under the regulation of the Quality Assurance Board.

It provides educational services in Nursery, Primary, and Secondary education, but is also approved by the National Board for Technical Education (NBTE) as a skills development center for National Skills Qualification (NSQ) Certification.

📍

Our Location

No. 22 Ni'ma Road, Hayin Danmani, Kaduna-Nigeria

The Academy focuses on providing knowledge and skills for youth, enabling them to proceed to Senior Secondary Schools, tertiary institutions, or enter the workforce as master craftsmen with NSQ certification.

🎯Purpose

Mission and Vision

🚀

Our Mission

To be a focal basic and Senior Secondary Education Training Institution that will prepare children in both knowledge and skills ready for admission into tertiary institutions in all spheres of knowledge as well as empower the youth with skills in those skill gap areas for self-employment.

👁️

Our Vision

To provide both technical vocational competence and ethical integrity in order to ensure quality basic, secondary, and life skills training that guarantee achievement of the 3Es – Education, Employment, and Economic Independence.

🏆

First in Class

Brainstorm Academy is one of the foremost private basic education institutions in Hayin Danmani, Kaduna, and the first to secure NBTE approval as a skill development center.

📚Curriculum

NSQ Courses Offered

Brainstorm Academy offers a range of NSQ courses combining theory, practical, and hands-on experience.

Technology6 months

Networking and System Security Installation

Intermediate→
Technology4 months

Website Design & Development

Beginner→
Technology3 months

Mobile Phone Repair

Beginner→
Engineering6 months

Electrical Installations

Intermediate→
Craftsmanship5 months

Furniture Making

Intermediate→
Arts & Design4 months

Painting, Decoration & Finishes (Interior Design)

Beginner→
Craftsmanship4 months

Wood Work

Beginner→
Craftsmanship3 months

Upholstery

Beginner→
Construction6 months

Bricklaying, Block laying, Concreting And Interlocking

Intermediate→
Engineering5 months

Plumbing & Pipe Fitting

Intermediate→
Service4 months

Hospitality & Catering

Beginner→
Beauty & Wellness4 months

Cosmetology & Beauty Therapy

Beginner→
Arts & Design5 months

Fashion Design & Garment Making

Beginner→
Technology3 months

Hardware Maintenance

Beginner→
Engineering5 months

Welding And Fabrication

Intermediate→
Engineering3 months

Home Electrical Appliances

Beginner→
Engineering4 months

Aluminium Fabrication

Intermediate→
✅

Graduate Guarantee

Trainees are guaranteed the 3Es: Education, Employment, and Economic Independence.

🎯Goals

Curriculum Goal

🎓

Academic Excellence

Our curricula are geared towards developing the abilities and skills of pupils, preparing them for Senior Secondary Education and tertiary institutions.

🛠️

Technical Competence

For skill-oriented courses, the curriculum focuses on developing technical competence and a positive work ethic.

💼

Career Readiness

Graduates are prepared for operative and supervisory jobs or to become small business owners.

🤝

Industry Partnerships

We have entered MoUs with industry practitioners to meet certification standards.

🏢Infrastructure

Facilities and Learning Features

🔬

Modern Laboratories

State-of-the-art lab equipment for hands-on learning

💻

Computer Lab

Fully equipped computer laboratory with internet access

🏗️

Workshop Facilities

Daily practical workshops and training sessions

🏢

Industry Visits

Regular industrial visits and excursions

⚖️Equality

Gender Policy

🌟

Commitment to Equality

Brainstorm Academy is committed to gender equality, fostering an inclusive environment for all students, staff, and trainees. Our policy ensures equal opportunities, eliminates discrimination, and empowers women and girls through scholarships, mentorship programs, and gender-inclusive curriculum.

🎯

Policy Alignment

We promote gender-sensitive practices in recruitment, training, and partnerships, aligning with Nigeria's National Gender Policy and SDG 5.

💫

Discover More About Us

Contact us to learn how Brainstorm Academy can empower you or your child.
